headline: Intuitive Surgical vs Boston Scientific: Which Stock Is the Better Buy Post Q1?
summary: Intuitive Surgical's strong Q1 results, rising procedures, and raised outlook highlight accelerating growth, while Boston Scientific faces headwinds and tempered guidance.

headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Intuitive Surgical (ISRG): Should You Buy?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Intuitive Surgical Recalls Put da Vinci Revenue Reliability Under Scrutiny
summary: Intuitive Surgical (NasdaqGS:ISRG) has initiated multiple FDA-enforced recalls of certain reusable da Vinci surgical instruments, including forceps, scissors, drivers, and graspers. The recalls follow increased safety complaints tied to fraying or broken cables in affected instruments. These actions cover products distributed to hospitals and surgical centers in the US and a range of international markets. The recalls are voluntary and firm initiated, with the FDA classifying and announcing...
